ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the product in various classifications */,
  "diameter_inch" REAL /* Diameter of the product in inches */,
  "diameter_mm" REAL /* Diameter of the product in millimeters */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "manufacturing_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturing line */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance range for the product dimensions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product this specification relates to */,
  "british_standard" TEXT /* British standard classification for the product */,
  "french_standard" TEXT /* French standard classification for the product */,
  "german_standard" TEXT /* German standard classification for the product */,
  "japanese_standard" TEXT /* Japanese standard classification for the product */,
  "swiss_standard" TEXT /* Swiss standard classification for the product */,
  "product_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product type */,
  "manufacturing_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturing line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the specification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the specification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_product_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_type_id") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specifications_manufacturing_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturing_line_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturing_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the manufacturing line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturing line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturing line */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Production capacity of the line */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the line (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the manufacturing line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the manufacturing line was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality control check */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the quality control check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "manufacturing_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturing line */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inspector */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the quality control check was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the quality control check was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_manufacturing_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturing_line_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_lines ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., View, Edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user’s browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
